summary: Third-iteration verification of SideNav layout, verbatim consent banner + cookie preferences copy, QuietCta text-link CTAs, sonner Noted. toast, no em dashes in visible text, no .tl-btn/nav-cta-fit in navigation, mobile nav pattern, Fit submit, and FAQPage JSON-LD regression. Backend pytest 6/6 pass. All frontend requirements verified.
critical_code_review_comments: SideNav.jsx: NavLink inactive class uses 'text-tl-ink2/70 hover:text-tl-ink' — substring test for 'text-tl-ink' matches both active and hover-inactive states. Visual confirmation shows the active link (Signals on /signals) is rendered darker in the screenshot, so this is only a testability nit. Consider using aria-current or a distinct active class token to make automated assertions cleaner.
AnimatedLogo.jsx wordmark SVG duplication carried over from iteration_2 remains; still worth factoring.
seed_data_creation: One TEST_UI3 Fit submission created via Playwright to verify submit flow. Safe to leave.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Signals page has 2 ld+json scripts (index 0 = Organization @graph, index 1 = FAQPage). Query all when validating FAQ entities. SideNav CSS uses uppercase text-transform so Playwright inner_text returns uppercased labels (HOME, WHAT WE DO, ...). Active state check: prefer aria-current or compare computed color rather than class substring. Consent banner clears via localStorage.removeItem('thrumline_consent_v1'). Sonner toast renders duplicated text nodes; matching 'Noted.' via substring is reliable.
verified_features: Consent banner body verbatim exact match ('We take your privacy as seriously as we take our work. ... but only if you say yes.')
Consent banner buttons: Accept / Decline / Preferences (exact text)
Consent banner is FULL VIEWPORT WIDTH: width=1920 at viewport=1920 (ratio 1.00, x=0), fixed inset-x-0 at bottom
Sonner toast 'Noted.' shown on banner Accept and on modal Accept all

Cookie preferences modal heading exactly 'Cookie preferences'; intro verbatim match; rows for Strictly necessary (Always on, no toggle), Google Analytics (toggle-ga), Microsoft Clarity (toggle-clarity); buttons Reject all / Save preferences / Accept all (exact)

SideNav present at right edge (x=1286 in 1440vw), vertically centered (y=386,h=129 in vh=900), contains exactly 5 links Home/What We Do/How It Works/Signals/Fit, no CTA button, not inside a top header
No .tl-btn or [data-testid=nav-cta-fit] anywhere in the DOM on home page (count=0)
Mobile @375: side-nav hidden; mobile-nav visible with wordmark + Menu button; menu opens sheet with 5 serif links (mobile-nav-link-*)
QuietCta on hero-cta, close-cta-fit, whatwedo-cta-fit, hiw-cta-fit, signals-cta-fit — all <a> tags, text 'Find out if we’re the right fit →', border-b class present, not filled pills
Fit submit button text 'Book the intro call →', no tl-btn class, POST /api/fit/submit → 200 → fit-success shown
No em dash (U+2014) present in body text on /, /what-we-do, /how-it-works, /signals, /fit, /privacy-policy, /404nope

Page <title> uses middle dot separator on every route: 'Thrumline · Marketing execution and momentum', 'What We Do · Thrumline', 'How It Works · Thrumline', 'Signals · Thrumline', 'Fit · Thrumline', 'Privacy Policy · Thrumline', 'Not found · Thrumline'
Signals FAQPage JSON-LD (script index 1) mainEntity length=2 with question.name and acceptedAnswer.text exact-matching visible DOM strings
Backend: /api/health, /api/, /api/fit/submit (valid + persistence), /api/fit/submit 422 on missing/invalid email, 422 on missing name — 6/6 passing
